ab: Arase maimurukɨkɨ emcɨ ngipicu, drumamusu psédemekwa
ch: A:Arasɨ，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: Arase, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?
I don’t have one either. This is Mrinu’s.

ab: duruma musu psédɨmekwala sɨpéliakɨ si kusɨvéréswa
ch: A:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.
Sure, take it.
Thank you and thank Mrinu for me.
May I help you?
I want to return these two books.
No problem and what else do you need?
I would like to borrow these three books.

ch: A:好了，記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.
You haven’t returned me the eraser.
I returned it yesterday.

ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了。
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?
Did you lend it to Mrinona?
I don’t know. I will go and ask her.
I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: Mrino kɨné ɨbɨlɨ ka pakésdemani swa Arasɨ?
en: Mrino, did Arasɨ lend you this coat?

ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的。
en: No, my mom bought it for me.
Arasɨ’s coat is the same as yours.

ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.
Mrino, did you borrow money from Arasa?

ab: iyo, tlunɨli ka sesa kusvérédri makɨ maimurukɨ ɨngmcɨ pésu.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.
Then, when will you return the money?
I will return to him tomorrow.
Okay, I will tell Arasa for you.
